content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "K-divisible Sum". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1476/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum sum of a subarray that is divisible by k.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to calculate the maximum sum of a subarray that is divisible by k.
